gaps.why: Only one clearly southwest-islands-specific asset exists in-repo (`gallery/gili-tangkong.webp`). The rest are generic snorkeling/Gili fillers.
Only `pink-beach-lombok` and `tanjung-ringgit-lombok` are location-specific in-repo today.
Only `tiu-kelep-waterfall` and `g-waterfall-1` are waterfall-specific in-repo today, with `destinations/rinjani.webp` as a generic fallback.
